members.name: AddCollisionExceptionWith
members.summary: Adds a body to the list of bodies that this body can't collide with.

members.name: ApplyCentralForce
members.summary: Distributes and applies a force to all points. A force is time dependent and meant to be applied every physics update.

members.name: ApplyCentralImpulse
members.summary: Distributes and applies an impulse to all points. An impulse is time-independent! Applying an impulse every frame would result in a framerate-dependent force. For this reason, it should only be used when simulating one-time impacts (use the "_force" functions otherwise).

members.name: ApplyForce
members.signature: public void ApplyForce(int pointIndex, Vector3 force)
members.summary: Applies a force to a point. A force is time dependent and meant to be applied every physics update.

members.name: ApplyImpulse
members.signature: public void ApplyImpulse(int pointIndex, Vector3 impulse)
members.summary: Applies an impulse to a point. An impulse is time-independent! Applying an impulse every frame would result in a framerate-dependent force. For this reason, it should only be used when simulating one-time impacts (use the "_force" functions otherwise).

members.name: GetCollisionExceptions
members.summary: Returns an array of nodes that were added as collision exceptions for this body.

members.name: GetCollisionLayerValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_layer] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetCollisionMaskValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_mask] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetPhysicsRid
members.summary: Returns the internal [RID] used by the [PhysicsServer3D] for this body.

members.name: GetPointTransform
members.summary: Returns local translation of a vertex in the surface array.

members.name: IsPointPinned
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if vertex is set to pinned.

members.name: RemoveCollisionExceptionWith
members.summary: Removes a body from the list of bodies that this body can't collide with.

members.name: SetCollisionLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionLayerValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_layer], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetCollisionMaskValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionMaskValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_mask], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetPointPinned
members.signature: public void SetPointPinned(int pointIndex, bool pinned, NodePath attachmentPath, int insertAt)
members.summary: Sets the pinned state of a surface vertex. When set to [code]true[/code], the optional [param attachment_path] can define a [Node3D] the pinned vertex will be attached to.

members.name: CollisionLayer
members.summary: The physics layers this SoftBody3D [b]is in[/b]. Collision objects can exist in one or more of 32 different layers. See also [member collision_mask]. [b]Note:[/b] Object A can detect a contact with object B only if object B is in any of the layers that object A scans. See [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/physics/physics_introduction.html#collision-layers-and-masks]Collision layers and masks[/url] in the documentation for more information.

members.name: CollisionMask
members.summary: The physics layers this SoftBody3D [b]scans[/b]. Collision objects can scan one or more of 32 different layers. See also [member collision_layer]. [b]Note:[/b] Object A can detect a contact with object B only if object B is in any of the layers that object A scans. See [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/physics/physics_introduction.html#collision-layers-and-masks]Collision layers and masks[/url] in the documentation for more information.

members.name: DampingCoefficient
members.summary: The body's damping coefficient. Higher values will slow down the body more noticeably when forces are applied.

members.name: DisableMode
members.summary: Defines the behavior in physics when [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED].

members.name: DragCoefficient
members.summary: The body's drag coefficient. Higher values increase this body's air resistance. [b]Note:[/b] This value is currently unused by Godot's default physics implementation.

members.name: LinearStiffness
members.summary: Higher values will result in a stiffer body, while lower values will increase the body's ability to bend. The value can be between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code] (inclusive).

members.name: ParentCollisionIgnore
members.summary: [NodePath] to a [CollisionObject3D] this SoftBody3D should avoid clipping.

members.name: PressureCoefficient
members.summary: The pressure coefficient of this soft body. Simulate pressure build-up from inside this body. Higher values increase the strength of this effect.

members.name: RayPickable
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [SoftBody3D] will respond to [RayCast3D]s.

members.name: ShrinkingFactor
members.summary: Scales the rest lengths of [SoftBody3D]'s edge constraints. Positive values shrink the mesh, while negative values expand it. For example, a value of [code]0.1[/code] shortens the edges of the mesh by 10%, while [code]-0.1[/code] expands the edges by 10%. [b]Note:[/b] [member shrinking_factor] is best used on surface meshes with pinned points.

members.name: SimulationPrecision
members.summary: Increasing this value will improve the resulting simulation, but can affect performance. Use with care.

members.name: TotalMass
members.summary: The SoftBody3D's mass.

values.name: DISABLE_MODE_KEEP_ACTIVE
values.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], do not affect the physics simulation.

values.name: DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE
values.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], remove from the physics simulation to stop all physics interactions with this [SoftBody3D]. Automatically re-added to the physics simulation when the [Node] is processed again.

constants.name: DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE
constants.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], remove from the physics simulation to stop all physics interactions with this [SoftBody3D]. Automatically re-added to the physics simulation when the [Node] is processed again.

constants.name: DISABLE_MODE_KEEP_ACTIVE
constants.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], do not affect the physics simulation.
